summary: Q1 2026 earnings beat (Apr 14): EPS $5.94 vs $5.45 est, revenue $50.54B vs $49.17B est. Record Markets performance, strong IB revenue, higher NII. CEO Dimon warned credit downturn will be 'worse than people think' (Apr 28). $19.8B tech/AI budget, 65k+ technologists. S&P 500 target raised back to 7,600 (Apr 21) after cut to 7,200. Legal issue: JPM exec sued for sexual harassment of junior banker (Apr 30).
